sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: TutorsMD is responsible for data processing on this website. If you have any questions about privacy, please contact our support team.

sections.title: 2. Data collected
sections.content: We collect the following personal data: name, email address, timezone, as well as technical data such as IP address and browser information.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
sections.content: Your data is used solely to provide our platform services, communicate with you, and improve our services.

sections.title: 4. Data sharing
sections.content: Your data is not shared with third parties unless required to fulfil a contract or you have given explicit consent.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, delete and restrict the processing of your personal data. Contact us at any time via the support chat.
